description: Analyze customer churn using WPS Spreadsheet starting with the raw data at /home/ga/Documents/telco_customer_churn.csv. Save the resulting workbook to /home/ga/Documents/churn_analysis.xlsx. The workbook must include a 'Data' sheet containing the original data plus two calculated columns: 'Lost_MRR' (Column V), which captures MonthlyCharges (Col S) for churned customers (Col U is 'Yes'), and 'High_Value_Churn' (Column W), identifying churned customers with MonthlyCharges over 80. Create a 'Dashboard' sheet featuring summary tables for Contract Type (Month-to-month, One year, Two year) and Internet Service (DSL, Fiber optic, No) showing Total Customers, Churned Customers, Churn Rate, and Total Lost MRR. Additionally, include KPIs for Overall Churn Rate, Total Lost MRR, Avg Tenure (for churned customers), and High Value Churned Count. Format all rates as percentages and MRR values as currency.
